list.title: Your personal savings
list.description: Set a target and a date, and we'll track your progress. Each goal is a pot within your one wallet, not a separate account.

frequency.label: Contribution frequency
frequency.hint: Contributions start small to build the habit and grow gradually until you hit your target.

plan.daily: Start at <0></0> today and build up to <1></1> over {{count}} days.
plan.weekly: Start at <0></0> this week and build up to <1></1> over {{count}} weeks.
plan.monthly: Start at <0></0> this month and build up to <1></1> over {{count}} months.

image.label: Picture (optional)
image.hint: Add a photo of what you're saving for to keep the dream alive.

info.unallocated: You currently have <0></0> unallocated. Assign it to a goal to keep your saving on track.

deposit.title: Add money
deposit.description: Move funds from your available balance into this allocation.
deposit.descriptionOnchain: Move funds from your available balance into this goal's on-chain vault. Deposits are free.

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.feeNote: A {{fee}}% withdrawal fee is taken on-chain. You receive the amount net of the fee.

plan.title: Contribution plan
plan.subtitle: {{cadence}} · grows gradually
plan.allDone: You've completed every step of your plan. 🎉

keepGoing.daily: Keep going daily. About <0>{{count}} days</0> of contributions left to reach your target.
keepGoing.weekly: Keep going weekly. About <0>{{count}} weeks</0> of contributions left to reach your target.
keepGoing.monthly: Keep going monthly. About <0>{{count}} months</0> of contributions left to reach your target.

vault.title: On-chain vault
vault.description: Funds you allocate are deposited into this vault on Monad. A {{fee}}% protocol fee is taken on each withdrawal.

delete.title: Delete goal
delete.descWithBalance: This returns the full {{amount}} balance to your available funds and closes the goal.
delete.descWithFee: This withdraws the full {{amount}} balance back to your available funds (minus the {{fee}}% withdrawal fee) and closes the goal.

toast.streakDescription: Nice, that deposit counts toward your savings streak.

deposit.prompt: Your wallet is self-custodial. Connect it to sign the deposit yourself.

withdrawal.prompt: Your wallet is self-custodial. Connect it to sign the withdrawal yourself.

errors.unavailable: On-chain goal savings isn't available on this deployment.
